Bus Timings

410 Bus Timetable Mussafah Port to LifeCare Hospital

February 26, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

One of the most important cities in UAE is Abu Dhabi. With population around 1.5 million people, public transportation is highly relied upon for citizen mobility. If you are right now in Abu Dhabi and need to travel between Mussafah Port and LifeCare Hospital, the 410 bus route operated by the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport is a reliable and convenient option.

As for your information about Mussafah Port, it is home to various industries and businesses. The port is a bustling point of departure for the route, serving a wide array of passengers daily. This area is significant for its shipping activities and is home to various industries and businesses. And it becomes the starting point of 410 bus. Contents

410 Bus Timing

The 410 bus operates from early morning until late at night, ensuring that passengers can find a bus at convenient times. The first bus departs from Mussafah port at 05.09 and the last bus depart at 23.10.

From Mussafah Port From LifeCare Hospital
05:09 05:33
05:39 05:50
05:59 06:05
06:13 06:26
06:28 06:43
06:53 07:03
07:23 07:23
07:48 07:43
08:08 08:03
08:31 08:23
08:48 08:48
09:08 09:28
09:38 10:03
10:08 10:33
10:38 11:03
11:02 11:33

12:02 12:33
12:32 13:03

13:30 14:03
14:02 14:33
14:32 15:03
15:06 15:33

15:40 16:05
16:02 16:25
16:29 16:40
16:54 17:00
17:19 17:25
17:39 17:39
17:59 18:05

18:34 19:02
18:59 19:35
19:29 20:08
20:02 20:33
20:32 21:03
21:06 21:33
21:36 22:03
22:10 22:33
22:40 23:03
23:10 23:33

Download PDF Bus 410

Buses run approximately every 20-30 minutes, providing frequent service throughout the day. And here is 410 bus timetable for you.

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or follow this link for 410 Bus Timings.## 410 Bus Route

As the information above, the 410 bus route spans from Mussafah Port to LifeCare Hospital covering a variety of stops that serve residential, commercial, and industrial areas. This route ensures passengers can reach important locations throughout the city.

The total of the stops of this route is 42 stops with some of the stop keys are below

  1. Mussafah Port: The starting point, significant for its shipping and industrial activities.

  2. Al Jaber Group: An important stop for those working in the area.

3.

  1. Abu Dhabi Ship Building: A crucial stop for the shipbuilding industry.

  2. AD Cable Factory: Serving industrial workers.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. ICAD Residential City (Gates XX and 2): Major residential zones for workers.

  2. Al Anwar St: Stops at Al Ain University and LLH Medical Centre, vital for students and healthcare services.

8.

  1. Mafraq Hospital: An essential healthcare facility in the region.

  2. Bani Yas St: Stops include the Baniyas Cooperative Society and Taxi Station.

  3. Al Dh’oun St: Key residential and community areas.

  4. Al Raha Village: Near the route’s end, providing access to residential areas.

  5. LifeCare Hospital: The final destination, important for patients and healthcare workers.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the A1 Airport Bus route, which runs from Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque, and the Airport Bus A2, which travels from Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Street.Read Also: Bus Timings from Abu Dhabi Bus Station ## Fare

The fare for the 410 bus route is very affordable, typically ranging between AED 2 to AED 4, depending on the distance traveled. The buses are well-equipped to ensure a comfortable journey for all passengers includes Air Conditioning, Free Wifi, Comfortable seating and many more.## Journey Experience

Taking a trip on the 410 bus from Mussafah Port to LifeCare Hospital offers a scenic journey through some of Abu Dhabi’s bustling industrial and residential zones.

Along the way, passengers can observe the transition from industrial landscapes to more community-oriented areas.

The 410 bus route from Mussafah Port to LifeCare Hospital is a crucial part of Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network. It provides a reliable, affordable, and efficient means of travel, connecting various key areas and landmarks across the city.

And of course the 410 bus timing or timetable above will help you to show the schedule of the bus. Whether you’re commuting for work, visiting family, or accessing healthcare services, the 410 bus route offers a dependable solution for your transportation needs in Abu Dhabi.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 26, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
